Summary.The method to prepare the Ramp up Dashbo: 1. Hiring info data (Raw Data) - should have any and all data for the hires, can be referred to in case of doubts or mismatches

Summary.Unnamed: We further have a list to explain each variable in details

Summary.The method to prepare the Ramp up Dashbo: 2. Ramp up Data (Raw Data Refined) - only variable that will be of use in the Dashboard
3. Refined view of all Roles, teams, Streams and any other level of granularity we might have (Roles) (Dimension Tables)
6. HR metrics - Talent data for all hirees - skills, trainings, attrition, GallupQ, etc
7. Health Score - a summary score taken from executives on what the current status of health is for the GCC

Summary.Unnamed: The summary needs to only be used for the current month, we can keep a separate history for all months prior, the data is used for current month only, and only latest data should be updated

Summary.The method to prepare the Ramp up Dashbo: 8. Program trackers for different control towers to monitor overall progress on different fronts
9. Financial information - info on all the spend for the GCC, can have different parts - for ex. Fixed, labour, etc

Summary.Unnamed: Financial Forecast - Variable spend for the GCC - labor spend
Fixed spend - spend across Governance, Workplace Advisory and Real Estate (WARE), and Enterprise Strategy & Operational Blueprint (ESOB)
